pluginMechanism: context routing and sandboxed tool output

args:
Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Core API Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/hono-base.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/client/client.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md

# Core API Read/Write Ledger

## src/index.ts

- Public surface: Exports Hono class and type definitions (Env, Handler, Context, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions)
- Internal names noticed: Hono re-export from './hono', type exports from './types', Context export from './context', HonoRequest type from './request', client types from './client'
- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
- Plain-English summary: Main entry point module that re-exports the Hono framework class and all public type definitions for consumers of the package
- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports Hono class from ./hono, types (Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse) from ./types, Context from ./context, HonoRequest type from ./request, and client type inference utilities from ./client

- Internal names noticed: RouterRoute, BlankEnv, BlankInput, BlankSchema, HandlerResponse, HTTPResponseError, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, AddParam, IntersectNonAnyTypes, ParamKeys, ParamKeyToRecord, ExtractInput, AddDollar, Endpoint, ResponseFormat, KnownResponseFormat, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, RemoveBlankRecord, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, FetchEventLike, FormValue, ParsedFormValue
- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions module containing interfaces for handlers, middleware, routing, validation, and typed response handling throughout Hono
- Copy-safe detail: 2777 lines of TypeScript type declarations covering HandlerInterface with overloaded methods for 1-10 handlers, MiddlewareHandlerInterface for use() with 1-10 handlers, OnHandlerInterface for on() with method/path/handler patterns, ToSchema output type calculation, TypedResponse generic type, ValidationTargets with json/form/query/param/header/cookie keys, path parameter extraction types, and utility types for type manipulation

- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types

- Copy-safe detail: Class extends HonoBase<E, S, BasePath>, constructor accepts HonoOptions with optional router parameter, uses SmartRouter with [new RegExpRouter(), new TrieRouter()] as default, delegates to super(options) for initialization

## src/hono-base.ts

## src/request.ts
